Snapshot Industries Ltd.

Chemicals
Snapshot Industries Ltd. is a specialty chemicals maker incorporated in 1987, supplying agrochemical intermediates across India and Europe.
  • Market Cap42,500 Cr.
  • Current Price2,315
  • Stock P/E31.4

  • Price to book5.6
  • Book Value413
  • Dividend Yield0.6 %
  • ROCE24.3 %
  • ROE19.8 %
  • Face Value1
  • Promoter holding52.4 %

Pros

  • Consistent 20%+ ROCE across a decade
  • Nearly debt free

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 5.6 times its book value
